title: MultiRuntimePool warms agent-sdk sessions keyed incl promptMode; heterogeneous with PTY; status visible

tests.summary: sdk-pool-ok — Pool block (2 tests) green: agentSdkPoolKey includes provider+model+promptMode so full != lean ('agent-sdk:ollama-local:qwen3:8b:full'); a MultiRuntimePool warms a full pool AND a lean pool as DISTINCT pools alongside a PTY-style stub (heterogeneous in one pool); pool.status() exposes each agent-sdk pool with its role; checkout draws a warm agent-sdk session whose harness.promptMode matches its key. No pool rewrite — the pool is adapter-agnostic; the composite runtime id carries promptMode.

typecheck.summary: tsc --noEmit clean (run with the full suite gate).

notes: MultiRuntimePool keys by runtime id and drives rt.adapter.spawn(rt.spawnConfig); WarmPtySessionPool tolerates non-PTY sessions (its isAlive treats a missing method as alive). One stateless AgentSdkAdapter backs both keyed pools. Auto-sizing from the active Profile is the pool's existing per-entry size budget; live pool wiring into the gateway is AS-route/AS-ollama-live territory.
